annotations.label: Closed form at integer/half-integer real part

anchor.snippet: If the real part is an integer or a half-integer , this can be finitely expressed in closed form

annotations.note: Mathlib has Γ(n) = (n-1)! and Γ(1/2) = √π plus the recurrence, but no packaged closed-form for arbitrary integer/half-integer arguments.

anchors.snippet: If the real part is an integer or a half-integer , this can be finitely expressed in closed form

anchors.value: {\displaystyle {\begin{aligned}|\Gamma (bi)|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{b\sinh \pi b}}\\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left({\tfrac {1}{2}}+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{\cosh \pi b}}\\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left(1+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi b}{\sinh \pi b}}\\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left(1+n+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi b}{\sinh \pi b}}\prod _{k=1}^{n}\left(k^{2}+b^{2}\right),\quad n\in \mathbb {N} \\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left(-n+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{b\sinh \pi b}}\prod _{k=1}^{n}\left(k^{2}+b^{2}\right)^{-1},\quad n\in \mathbb {N} \\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left({\tfrac {1}{2}}\pm n+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{\cosh \pi b}}\prod _{k=1}^{n}\left(\left(k-{\tfrac {1}{2}}\right)^{2}+b^{2}\right)^{\pm 1},\quad n\in \mathbb {N} \\[-1ex]&\end{aligned}}}
